summary: Comprehensive backend + frontend testing of the June 2026 auth redesign (email+password only, @prarambhika.com domain-restricted). Backend: 23/23 pytest cases pass (login validation, removed OTP endpoints return 404, user creation with permissions map, forced password-change lifecycle, super-admin reset flow, PATCH email/password rules, deactivated login blocked, all demo accounts login). Frontend: login page renders correctly with testIDs (login-email/password/btn-login + quick chips), client-side domain error appears without network call, Super Admin login → /dashboard, force-change flow works end-to-end on a throwaway teacher and re-login lands directly on dashboard, /manage/coach/new shows field-name/field-email/field-password + perm-customize-switch, /manage/teacher/{id} shows reset-pwd-input + btn-reset-password. ONE BUG FOUND: Profile 'Change password' row is HIDDEN for super_admin (regression not fixed) — see rca_of_issue.

ui_bugs.issue: Profile 'Change password' menu row is explicitly hidden for super_admin (line 62: `{user.role !== "super_admin" && (<Row ... testID="menu-change-pwd" />)}`). Review request requires: 'Profile change-password works for Super Admin too — previously blocked for super admin.' The gate must be removed. Backend endpoint POST /api/auth/password/change works fine for super_admin (verified via tests) — this is purely a UI gate that was NOT removed as part of the redesign.

react_native_issues.issue: Console warnings: 'shadow*' style props are deprecated (use 'boxShadow'); 'props.pointerEvents' is deprecated (use style.pointerEvents). Non-blocking; carried over from iteration 7. Reference: /var/log/supervisor/expo.err.log

action_items: Fix Profile change-password gate: in /app/frontend/app/(tabs)/profile.tsx line 62, remove the `user.role !== 'super_admin'` condition so the 'Change password' Row is always rendered for authenticated users.
(Optional/low-priority) Migrate deprecated RN Web style props (shadow* → boxShadow, props.pointerEvents → style.pointerEvents).
critical_code_review_comments: Backend auth.py, users.py, core.py look clean: domain validation centralized in validate_domain_email; must_change_password lifecycle correctly toggled on admin-assigned password + admin PATCH + reset-password; RBAC intact.

core.py still exports MobileLoginIn / OtpSendIn / OtpVerifyIn / SetPasswordIn / create_temp_token / decode_temp_token / MOCK_OTP_CODE / SUPER_ADMIN_ALLOWED_MOBILES / OTP_* constants even though OTP routes are removed — dead code, safe to prune.
seed.py migrates legacy @pws-alpha.com → @prarambhika.com and re-applies demo passwords on restart (idempotent).
Frontend uses EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL (not EXPO_BACKEND_URL) — this matches frontend/.env; ensure future testing agents use the correct var name.
seed_data_creation: Tests create throwaway teachers with random-suffixed emails (testteacher_*@prarambhika.com, uitest_teacher_*@prarambhika.com, deact_*@prarambhika.com) and clean them up via DELETE /api/users/{id} in fixture teardown / after Playwright run. No leftover pollution expected.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend auth-redesign fully verified. Only outstanding issue is UI: Profile 'Change password' hidden for super_admin (single-line fix in profile.tsx). Env: use EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL (not EXPO_BACKEND_URL). Reset password box on teacher edit uses testIDs reset-pwd-input + btn-reset-password. Force-change screen testIDs force-new-pwd, force-new-pwd2, btn-force-change. Login testIDs login-email, login-password, btn-login. Quick chip testID pattern: quick-<role-lower-hyphenated>. Remember: Metro file-watching disabled (CI=true) — restart expo after frontend edits.
rca_of_issue: BUG: Super Admin cannot access Profile → Change password modal. ROOT CAUSE: /app/frontend/app/(tabs)/profile.tsx line 62 wraps the Change-password Row in `{user.role !== 'super_admin' && (…)}`, a leftover from the previous flow where Super Admin's password lived under OTP. Reproduction: (1) login as superadmin@prarambhika.com/Super@123, (2) navigate to Profile — the menu shows only Manage users & rosters, Notifications, Directory, About PWS & ALPHA; the 'Change password' Row is missing. Mitigation: delete the role guard so every authenticated user (including super_admin) can open the change-password modal. Backend /api/auth/password/change already accepts the request from super_admin (verified). Verified via UI screenshot at /tmp/profile.png.
